title: T-082 — UI: RiskRegisterScreen + RiskAddModal (RiskRegisterScreen prototype) (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-082 — Risk register UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §18 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md risk_register + risk_add_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/docs-screens.jsx:56-106 (RiskRegisterScreen) + design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:297-346 (RiskAddModal)

## Goal
Client component RiskRegisterScreen at /(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks listing risks with bucket badges + state badges + RiskAddModal (MODAL-07) for create + edit + state transitions.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/page.tsx (RSC) reads risks list + counts.
2. RiskRegisterScreen renders shadcn Table with columns Title/Likelihood/Impact/Score/Bucket badge/State badge/Owner/Actions; filter by state + bucket; bucket colors: High=red, Med=amber, Low=green.
3. RiskAddModal (shadcn Dialog) — RHF + zodResolver — fields title, description, likelihood (1-3), impact (1-3), mitigation; create/edit modes; lifecycle action triggers (Mitigate / Close / Reopen) with reason textarea ≥10 chars.
4. RTL parity test against prototype.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_components/risk-register-screen.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_components/risk-add-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_components/__tests__/risk-register.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/docs-screens.jsx [ref]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production RiskRegisterScreen renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/docs-screens.jsx:56-106 (RiskRegisterScreen), then it has the same column layout (Title/Likelihood/Impact/Score/Bucket/State/Owner/Actions) + bucket badges (High=red/Med=amber/Low=green) using shadcn Table + Badge primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given RiskAddModal renders (design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:297-346 RiskAddModal), then it has RHF fields (title, description, likelihood radio 1-3, impact radio 1-3, mitigation) using shadcn Dialog + Form + Input + RadioGroup primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
3. Given the user opens lifecycle action 'Mitigate' and types reason='short' (len<10), when Save is clicked, then a Zod inline error appears and updateRisk is NOT called per §18 reason contract

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/risk-register.test.tsx asserting parity + reason gating before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test risk-register'

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not allow Save when reason <10 chars on lifecycle transitions
- Do not use HTML <select> for likelihood/impact (use shadcn RadioGroup or Select)
